relationships: kab:Ulac amdan i yellan deg leɛqel-is ara ixedmen ayenni
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yella kra n yiwen i t-yeẓṛan﹖
kab:Tella Mary tḥemmel akk medden yellan deg terbaɛt-is
kab:Mary tekkes-d akk ayen yellan deg tculliḍt-is n yiḍes
kab:Tom akked Mary ttemwatan ɣef kra yellan
kab:Yella ḥedd i yellan tura neɣ yella yakan daki
kab:Ulac kra i yellan deg wadig-is
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yella win i t-yeẓṛan﹖
kab:Ulac win yellan da isem-is akken
kab:Ulac win i yellan deg tneɣrit-nni tura
kab:Yiwen n usurif amecṭuḥ yezmer ad ibeddel kra yellan
kab:Tella tin yellan tura neɣ tella yakan daki
kab:Ur texdim ara ayen yellan fell-as
kab:Ulac win yellan da yesɛa isem-nni
kab:Akka ttwaliɣ d acu yellan ur igerrez ara
kab:Tom akked Mary ttemwafaqen ɣef kra yellan
kab:Tom yeddem ayen akken yellan dagi
kab:Ur yelli kra yellan deg yifassen-is
kab:Dacu i yellan deg-s ma yeẓṛa-t walebɛaḍ﹖
kab:Akk wigad yellan dagi gan ayagi anagar Tom ur t-igi ara
kab:Akk wigad yellan dagi gan ayagi anagar Tom ur t-nga ara
kab:Yexdem kra yellan di tezmert-is akken ad d-yawi akayad-ines
kab:Aṭas n wayen ara iẓer yiwen i yellan deg Paris
kab:Ayɣer ur tɣetsem ara s yiman-nwen ayen yellan d uɣdim﹖
kab:Dacu-t wemgarad yellan ger Badminton d Tennis ﹖
kab:Amdan yellan d uksin ur yezmir ad yamen aya
kab:Bɣiɣ ad sleɣ kra yellan ɣef Mary
